name: Kotak Urbane Gold Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 4 Reward Points per ₹150 spent on dining and entertainment
2 Reward Points per ₹150 spent on all other categories

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver for the next year

additionalBenefits: 2X reward points on dining and entertainment spends
Easy EMI conversion on large transactions
pros: Double reward points on dining and entertainment make it good for lifestyle spenders
Achievable annual fee waiver threshold of ₹1.5 lakh
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
Welcome bonus of 1000 RP partially offsets joining fee
Reasonable annual fee for a mid-tier card
cons: Base reward rate of 0.33% is below average
3.5% foreign currency markup is on the higher side
Reward point value of ₹0.25 per point is relatively low
idealFor: Users who frequently dine out and spend on entertainment
Mid-income earners looking for a card with lounge access and lifestyle rewards
Those who want an achievable fee waiver with moderate annual spending

faqs.question: How do I earn accelerated reward points on dining?
faqs.answer: You automatically earn 4 Reward Points per ₹150 spent at restaurants, cafes, and entertainment outlets. The merchant category code (MCC) determines eligibility.

faqs.question: How can I redeem my Reward Points?
faqs.answer: Reward Points can be redeemed through the Kotak rewards catalogue for gifts, as statement credit against your outstanding balance, or converted to airmiles.

faqs.question: How do I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in a card membership year to get the next year's annual fee waived automatically.

faqs.question: Which lounges can I access with this card?
faqs.answer: You get 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year through the Visa lounge program. International lounge access is not included.
